---
title: "ggplot2: Elegant Graphics for Data Analysis"
author: "Hadley Wickham (with community additions by Mosiur Rahman)"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
output: bookdown::gitbook
documentclass: book
bibliography: references.bib
biblio-style: apalike
link-citations: yes
github-repo: Mosiuropu/ggplot2-book
twitter-handle: hadleywickham
description: "Master ggplot2 and the rich grammar that underlies it. This fork adds a practical chapter on agricultural and plant breeding data visualisation."
---

`r if (knitr::is_latex_output()) '<!--'`

# Welcome {-}

This is the online version of work-in-progress 3rd edition of "ggplot2: elegant graphics for data analysis"

> **Fork note:** This repository is a community fork by [Mosiur Rahman](https://github.com/Mosiuropu),
> extending the original book with a new chapter on
> [Agricultural & Plant Breeding Data Visualization](#agricultural-breeding-viz).

`r if (knitr::is_latex_output()) '-->'`
